p.strong: Atomic persistence sequence ensuring crash recovery

ul.li: os.Rename() utilizes the underlying filesystem's atomic inode swap.

ol.li: Corruption is impossible because we never overwrite the target file in-place.
Partial writes are isolated to the .tmp file.

tr.td: .tmp is partial. Main .json is untouched. System discards .tmp on restart.
Atomic Swap: Either the pointer moved to new inode or it didn't. No middle state.

ul.li: Filesystem: Ext4 / XFS / ZFS (Atomic Rename Supported)
